Aphids.identification: Small soft-bodied insects, green/black/brown, found in clusters on undersides of leaves and growing tips
Aphids.damage: Sucks plant sap, causes leaf curling, stunted growth, secretes honeydew leading to sooty mold, transmits viruses
Aphids.treatment: Imidacloprid 17.8% SL @ 0.5ml/L or Dimethoate @ 2ml/L or Thiamethoxam 25% WG @ 0.3g/L. Spray on undersides.
Aphids.organic_control: Neem oil 2% spray, Yellow sticky traps, Release ladybird beetles (Coccinella), Soap spray 1%

Whiteflies.identification: Tiny white moth-like insects, fly when leaves are disturbed, found on leaf undersides
Whiteflies.damage: Sucks sap, causes yellowing, transmits Yellow Mosaic Virus and Leaf Curl Virus, honeydew secretion
Whiteflies.treatment: Spiromesifen 22.9% SC @ 0.4ml/L or Pyriproxyfen @ 1.5ml/L or Acetamiprid 20% SP @ 0.3g/L. Spray in morning.
Whiteflies.organic_control: Yellow sticky traps (20-25/acre), Neem oil 2%, Reflective mulches, Intercrop with maize

Thrips.identification: Tiny slender insects (1-2mm), yellow/brown/black, rasping mouthparts
Thrips.damage: Silvery patches on leaves, distorted leaves, curling, reduced plant vigor, transmits viruses (IYSV in onion)
Thrips.treatment: Fipronil 5% SC @ 1.5ml/L or Spinosad 45% SC @ 0.3ml/L or Carbosulfan @ 2ml/L. Spray covers undersides.
Thrips.organic_control: Blue sticky traps, Neem oil 2%, Beauveria bassiana @ 5g/L, Avoid overhead irrigation

Red Spider Mites.identification: Tiny red/yellow/green mites, webbing on leaves, visible with magnifying glass
Red Spider Mites.damage: Stippling on leaves, bronzing, webbing, reduced photosynthesis, leaf drop in severe cases
Red Spider Mites.treatment: Dicofol @ 2.5ml/L or Wettable Sulphur @ 3g/L or Propargite @ 2ml/L or Spiromesifen. Rotate chemicals.
Red Spider Mites.organic_control: Neem oil + Sulphur spray, Increase humidity, Release predatory mites (Phytoseiulus), Water spray

Fruit Borer.identification: Greenish caterpillars with dark stripes, bore into fruits leaving holes with frass
Fruit Borer.damage: Bores into fruits causing rotting, reduces marketable yield significantly (up to 60% loss)
Fruit Borer.treatment: Indoxacarb 14.5% SC @ 0.5ml/L or Chlorantraniliprole 18.5% SC @ 0.3ml/L or Emamectin Benzoate @ 0.4g/L.
Fruit Borer.organic_control: Pheromone traps (20/acre), Bacillus thuringiensis (Bt) @ 2g/L, Neem seed kernel extract 5%, Hand picking

American Bollworm.identification: Caterpillars green to brown with lateral stripes, robust build, feeds on bolls/pods/fruits
American Bollworm.damage: Bores into cotton bolls, chickpea pods, causes yield loss 30-80%, economic pest
American Bollworm.treatment: HaNPV @ 250 LE/acre + Neem 2%, Spinosad @ 0.3ml/L, Indoxacarb @ 0.5ml/L. Apply in evening.
American Bollworm.organic_control: Pheromone traps, HaNPV (Helicoverpa Nuclear Polyhedrosis Virus), Bt @ 2g/L, Crop rotation with non-host

Pink Bollworm.identification: Pinkish caterpillars inside cotton bolls, rosetted and loculi damaged
Pink Bollworm.damage: Damages cotton bolls internally, reduces lint quality, causes pre-harvest boll shedding
Pink Bollworm.treatment: Chlorantraniliprole @ 0.3ml/L or Flubendiamide @ 0.2ml/L. Spray at 50% flowering and repeat.
Pink Bollworm.organic_control: Mating disruption with pheromones, Destroy crop residues by Nov 30, Deep ploughing, Bt cotton

Stem Borer (Rice).identification: Yellow/white larvae boring into stems, dead hearts in vegetative stage, white ears at heading
Stem Borer (Rice).damage: Dead heart (tillers dry), white ear heads (no grain fill), 10-30% yield loss
Stem Borer (Rice).treatment: Cartap Hydrochloride 4G @ 10 kg/acre or Chlorantraniliprole 0.4G @ 5 kg/acre. Apply in sitting water.
Stem Borer (Rice).organic_control: Release Trichogramma japonicum (50,000/acre), Light traps, Destroy stubbles, Clip leaf tips

Brown Plant Hopper.identification: Brown wedge-shaped hoppers at plant base, nymphs and adults in large numbers
Brown Plant Hopper.damage: Hopper burn (circular patches of dried plants), transmits viruses (grassy stunt, ragged stunt)
Brown Plant Hopper.treatment: Pymetrozine @ 0.6g/L or Buprofezin @ 2ml/L or Dinotefuran @ 0.3g/L. Spray at plant base, not on foliage.
Brown Plant Hopper.organic_control: Drain water for 3-5 days, Avoid excess nitrogen, Spider conservation, Use resistant varieties

Leaf Folder.identification: Caterpillars fold leaves longitudinally and feed inside, white linear feeding marks
Leaf Folder.damage: Reduces photosynthesis, white streaks on leaves, affects grain filling at later stage
Leaf Folder.treatment: Chlorantraniliprole @ 0.3ml/L or Cartap Hydrochloride @ 2g/L or Flubendiamide @ 0.2ml/L.
Leaf Folder.organic_control: Hand collection, Light traps, Release Trichogramma, Bt spray @ 2g/L, Avoid excess N

Pod Borer (Chickpea).identification: Greenish caterpillars with dark lines, feed on pods creating circular holes
Pod Borer (Chickpea).damage: Destroys developing seeds, 30-80% pod damage in severe cases
Pod Borer (Chickpea).treatment: Indoxacarb @ 0.5ml/L or Spinosad @ 0.3ml/L. Spray at 50% flowering and 10 days later.
Pod Borer (Chickpea).organic_control: HaNPV @ 250 LE/acre, Bt @ 2g/L, Bird perches (20/acre), Intercrop with coriander

Diamondback Moth.identification: Small greenish caterpillars, wriggle backward when disturbed, diamond pattern on adult moth
Diamondback Moth.damage: Skeletonizes leaves, damages heads, reduces marketability
Diamondback Moth.treatment: Spinosad @ 0.3ml/L or Chlorantraniliprole @ 0.3ml/L or Emamectin Benzoate @ 0.4g/L. Rotate insecticides.
Diamondback Moth.organic_control: Bt spray @ 2g/L, Mustard as trap crop, Pheromone traps, Neem seed extract 5%

Cutworm.identification: Fleshy gray-brown caterpillars, curl when touched, hide in soil during day
Cutworm.damage: Cuts seedlings at soil level at night, patchy gaps in crop stand
Cutworm.treatment: Poison bait (Wheat bran + Carbaryl), Chlorpyriphos @ 3ml/L drench around plants, Quinalphos 1.5D dust.
Cutworm.organic_control: Collect and destroy at night with torch, Flooding fields, Deep tillage to expose larvae, Neem cake in soil

Shoot Fly (Sorghum).identification: Small gray flies, maggots bore into central shoot of young plants
Shoot Fly (Sorghum).damage: Dead heart in 2-4 week old seedlings, tillers are attacked subsequently
Shoot Fly (Sorghum).treatment: Seed treatment Imidacloprid 70% WS @ 10g/kg. Spray Carbofuran 3G in whorl @ 8 kg/acre. Dimethoate @ 2ml/L.
Shoot Fly (Sorghum).organic_control: Early sowing (before July 20), High seed rate, Remove and destroy dead hearts, Fish meal trap

Jassids (Leafhoppers).identification: Small wedge-shaped green insects, move sideways on leaves, quick jumpers
Jassids (Leafhoppers).damage: Yellowing of leaf margins (hopper burn), curling downward, reduced plant vigor
Jassids (Leafhoppers).treatment: Imidacloprid @ 0.5ml/L or Fipronil @ 1.5ml/L or Acetamiprid @ 0.2g/L. Spray on lower leaf surface.
Jassids (Leafhoppers).organic_control: Neem oil 2%, Yellow sticky traps, Intercropping with onion, Resistant varieties

Mealy bugs.identification: White cottony insects in clusters, covered with waxy secretion, nymphs pink
Mealy bugs.damage: Sucks sap, stunts growth, honeydew causes sooty mold, deforms fruits, vector of viruses
Mealy bugs.treatment: Profenophos @ 2ml/L or Chlorpyriphos @ 2ml/L + Fish oil rosin soap. Spray to run-off.
Mealy bugs.organic_control: Release Cryptolaemus beetles, Neem oil soap spray, Remove ant colonies, High pressure water spray

Termites.identification: White soft-bodied insects in soil, mud tubes on stems/roots
Termites.damage: Hollows out roots and stems, sudden wilting, plant lodging, underground damage
Termites.treatment: Chlorpyriphos 20EC @ 2L/acre with irrigation or Imidacloprid 17.8SL @ 500ml/acre. Soil drench.
Termites.organic_control: Neem cake @ 250kg/acre, Deep ploughing, Remove crop residues, Avoid organic matter at sowing

Grasshoppers.identification: Large jumping insects, green or brown, consume large amounts of foliage
Grasshoppers.damage: Defoliates crops, consumes large leaf areas, swarms cause devastating damage
Grasshoppers.treatment: Chlorpyriphos @ 2.5ml/L or Malathion @ 2ml/L. In swarm situations, coordinate with government.
Grasshoppers.organic_control: Deep ploughing to expose eggs, Birds encourage, Neem products, Metarhizium acridum (Green Muscle)

Root Knot Nematodes.identification: Galls/knots on roots, stunted plants, wilting in afternoon, patchy growth in field
Root Knot Nematodes.damage: Root damage, nutrient/water uptake reduced, secondary infections, 20-50% yield loss
Root Knot Nematodes.treatment: Carbofuran 3G @ 10kg/acre at transplanting. Dazomet/Metam sodium for nursery fumigation.
Root Knot Nematodes.organic_control: Marigold intercrop, Paecilomyces lilacinus @ 5kg/acre, Neem cake @ 200kg/acre, Solarization

Fruit Fly.identification: Adults are small flies with patterned wings, maggots inside fruits
Fruit Fly.damage: Maggots feed inside fruits, fruit drop, rotting, export rejection
Fruit Fly.treatment: Protein bait (Malathion 50EC 10ml + Jaggery 100g + Water 1L) spray on one meter area on alternate plants.
Fruit Fly.organic_control: Methyl eugenol traps (25/acre), Pheromone traps, Collect and destroy fallen fruits, Bagging fruits
